note: Golden judge response (#54): hand-authored raw judge output exercising judge-only pitfalls plus vocabulary normalization ('traceable' -> traceability, 'major' -> high). The benchmark writes this into .sddgrade/judge.json with a runtime-generated hash manifest (content hashes must match the artifacts on disk), runs the real agent-judge path (read_judgment freshness check -> to_findings -> merge -> score), and asserts the expectations below.

findings.message: User Story 1 bundles search relevance and ranking quality into one story; it cannot be delivered or tested as independent slices.
findings.suggestion: Split ranking quality into its own story with separate acceptance criteria.

findings.message: FR-002 fails 29148 'verifiable': 'user-friendly and robust' admits no objective acceptance test.
findings.suggestion: Replace with measurable UX and failure-rate criteria (e.g. task completion rate, error budget).

expect.merged_overall_rationale: Re-derived 2026-07-09 on the merged engine: judge finding penalties are halved and capped (#51), so judged scores sit higher than the pre-hardening values this fixture was first authored against. Updated 2026-07-22: SPEC-PRONOUN-ANTECEDENT (low severity) added to lint, lowering merged_overall from 79.0 to 77.0.
